nodes.name: 莫桑比克
nodes.summary: 莫桑比克是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联154种鸟类，包括南非鸭、Shelley's francolin、Natal spurfowl等154种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Abyssinian thrush
nodes.summary: Abyssinian thrush（Abyssinian thrush，学名 Turdus abyssinicus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于莫桑比克。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The Abyssinian thrush occurs in the highlands of eastern Africa from South Sudan south to northern Mozambique. Its habitat includes forests woodlands, exotic plantations, parks and gardens. This species is a typical member of the genus Turdus but its habits and biology have been little studied, as it was considered to be a subspecies of olive thrush
